sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46681" key="h(dume/leia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡδῠ-μέλεια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n46681.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sweetness of melody</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:3:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.20</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
